subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Hearken unto the call of Husayn, Who summoneth thee from the Most Great Prison. This call verily quickeneth the body [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حسین بشنو ندای حسین را که در سجن اعظم ترا ندا میفرماید این ندا جسم را جان
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for service, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
